tiles.title: Température (5 min)
tiles.query: iot_events_raw | where type_mesure == 'temperature' | where timestamp_capteur > ago(5m) | summarize avg(valeur)

tiles.title: Pression (5 min)
tiles.query: iot_events_raw | where type_mesure == 'pression' | where timestamp_capteur > ago(5m) | summarize avg(valeur)

tiles.title: Humidité (5 min)
tiles.query: iot_events_raw | where type_mesure == 'humidite' | where timestamp_capteur > ago(5m) | summarize avg(valeur)

tiles.title: Évolution 30 min
tiles.query: iot_events_raw | where timestamp_capteur > ago(30m) | summarize avg(valeur) by type_mesure, bin(timestamp_capteur, 1m) | render timechart

tiles.title: Anomalies (1h)
tiles.query: iot_events_raw | where timestamp_capteur > ago(1h) | where valeur > percentile(valeur, 99) | count

tiles.title: Heatmap zones
tiles.query: iot_events_raw | where timestamp_capteur > ago(15m) | where type_mesure == 'temperature' | summarize avg(valeur) by ligne_production, zone
